name: Opus
author: commerce-main
description: A cold, operator-grade theme — The Great Work. Slate ground, monospace headers, a semantic accent/teal/clay system. Six alchemical palette flavors — Prima Materia, Nigredo, Albedo, Citrinitas, Rubedo, Verdigris — plus an accent picker and feature toggles via Style Settings. Light and dark, every flavor WCAG-audited.
